title: Raw Ore Block Smelting to Blocks
description: melt raw ore blocks in to blocks ( No longer wasting time )
body:
Efficient Smelting enhances your ore processing by allowing you to smelt raw copper, raw gold, and raw iron directly into their respective blocks. This mod simplifies and streamlines the smelting process, making it more intuitive and efficient for all your mining and crafting needs. 

**Features:** 🧩

Direct Smelting: Smelt raw copper, raw gold, and raw iron directly into blocks using any furnace.
Resource Optimization: Eliminate the need for intermediate steps, saving time and fuel.
Compatibility: Fully compatible with other mods and Minecraft versions that support furnace mechanics.
Balanced Gameplay: Maintains a fair smelting rate to ensure balanced resource acquisition and game progression.

![iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d87e1d6d2ee73096349a3adbfde4b59fa329565.webp)
